title: clusia savannarum
intro: Clusia savannarum, also known as the 'sangre de grado' or 'dragon's blood,' is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, characterized by its bright red sap that is highly valued for its medicinal properties. The sap of this plant has been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including wounds, fever, and infections, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. In addition to its medicinal properties, the plant has been found to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The sap of the Clusia savannarum plant is often used in herbal preparations, including tinctures, salves, and ointments, which can be applied topically to treat skin conditions and promote overall health.
